ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the application */,
  "loan_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan product applied for */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of loan applied for */,
  "loan_tenure" INTEGER /* Tenure of the loan in months */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was made */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "application_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the application was submitted (e.g., website, mobile app, in-person) */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., education, personal) */,
  "existing_debt" REAL /* Existing debt obligations of the customer */,
  "collateral" TEXT /* Collateral provided for the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_loan_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_product_id") REFERENCES loan_products ("loan_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_products" (
  "loan_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan product */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan product */,
  "max_loan_amount" REAL /* Maximum loan amount for the product */,
  "max_tenure" INTEGER /* Maximum tenure for the product in months */,
  "min_credit_score" INTEGER /* Minimum credit score required for the product */,
  "max_debt_to_income_ratio" REAL /* Maximum debt-to-income ratio allowed for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "credit_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the credit score belongs to */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external credit scoring agency that provided the credit score */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "credit_score_date" TEXT /* Date the credit score was retrieved */,
  "credit_score_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credit score was retrieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES external_agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for payment (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the loan officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan officer */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the loan officer (e.g., loan processor, underwriter) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the loan officer belongs to (e.g., personal loans, business loans) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application the status update belongs to */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "status_comments" TEXT /* Comments or reasons for the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application the communication belongs to */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date the communication was sent */,
  "communication_method" TEXT /* Method of communication (e.g., email, SMS, phone) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent to the customer */,
  "communication_status" TEXT /* Status of the communication (e.g., sent, delivered, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the agency's services */,
  "api_secret_key" TEXT /* Secret key for accessing the agency's API */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of external agency (e.g., credit scoring agency, collections agency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rules_engine" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for the rule (e.g., credit score, loan amount) */,
  "rule_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the rule (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "rule_category" TEXT /* Category of the rule (e.g., credit score, loan amount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_application_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., ID proof, income proof) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_application_documents_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collateral_details" (
  "collateral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collateral */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application the collateral belongs to */,
  "collateral_type" TEXT /* Type of collateral (e.g., property, vehicle) */,
  "collateral_value" REAL /* Value of the collateral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collateral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collateral_details_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection activity */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application the collection activity belongs to */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of the collection activity */,
  "collection_amount" REAL /* Amount collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)
